jsonLd.title: FabHotels is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
FabHotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabHotels:
FabHotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels!
